text.tspan: Country position on the Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty, 2023
The treaty's objective is to prevent the spread of nuclear weapons, to promote cooperation in the peaceful uses
of nuclear energy, and to pursue nuclear and general disarmament. A country's position on a treaty can be
Data source: United Nations Office for Disarmament Affairs (2024)
